pages.title: Free Lifting Tools | RackMath
pages.description: Free RackMath lifting tools for barbell plate math, warmup planning, one rep max estimates, lb to kg conversion, RPE, training volume, and workout planning.
pages.h1: Free lifting tools that get you from target weight to loaded bar.
pages.summary: Start with the free barbell plate calculator, then use RackMath to save lifts, run workouts, track PRs, and personalize training.

pages.title: Barbell Plate Calculator | Free RackMath Plate Visualizer
pages.description: Use the free RackMath barbell plate calculator to calculate plates per side for pounds or kilograms, choose your bar, and see the loaded bar before your next set.
pages.summary: Enter your target weight, choose pounds or kilograms, select your bar and available plates, and see exactly what to load on each side.

pages.title: Warmup Set Calculator | RackMath
pages.description: Plan warmup sets and jumps before your working weight with RackMath.
pages.summary: Enter your working weight and RackMath will build practical warmup jumps on the way to your top set.

pages.title: One Rep Max Calculator | RackMath
pages.description: Estimate your one rep max from weight and reps, then track PRs in RackMath.
pages.summary: Estimate your one rep max from a recent set, then use RackMath to track PRs and future training loads.

pages.title: Common Barbell Weights | RackMath
pages.description: See common barbell weights and the plates that make 95, 135, 185, 225, 315, and 405 lb.
pages.summary: See the plate math for common gym numbers like 95, 135, 185, 225, 315, and 405 lb.

pages.title: Pounds to Kilograms Plate Converter | RackMath
pages.description: Convert barbell loads between pounds and kilograms and see practical plate-loading options.
pages.summary: Convert barbell loads between pounds and kilograms, then use RackMath to load the closest practical weight.

pages.title: RPE Calculator | RackMath
pages.description: Estimate load targets from RPE and reps in reserve, then log the set in RackMath.
pages.summary: Estimate training loads from RPE and reps, then log the set in RackMath with context.

pages.title: Training Volume Calculator | RackMath
pages.description: Calculate lifting volume from sets, reps, and weight, then track weekly training in RackMath.
pages.summary: Calculate training volume from sets, reps, and weight so you can understand the workload behind a session.

pages.title: Powerlifting Attempt Calculator | RackMath
pages.description: Plan powerlifting attempts with practical jumps and plate-loading guidance.
pages.summary: Plan sensible opener, second, and third attempts from a recent max or estimated max.

pages.title: AI Workout Builder | RackMath
pages.description: Build a RackMath workout from your goal, schedule, equipment, and lifting experience.
pages.summary: Sketch a workout from your goal, schedule, equipment, and experience, then open RackMath to personalize and save it.

pages.title: Workout Plan Importer | RackMath
pages.description: Import a workout plan into RackMath from text, screenshots, PDFs, or coach programming.
pages.summary: Paste a coach plan, screenshot notes, or written routine idea, then open RackMath to turn it into a trackable workout.
